starting_material: Dictyochaeta simplex ATCC 20960

starting_material: Gilmaniella sp. FA4459

starting_material: Phialophora cyclaminis Mer-WF3010 FERM P-11475

scalability: 5 L jar fermentation

starting_material: Fusarium sambucinum AB1900A-1314 NRRL 21252

scalability: 5000 L fermentation; reported 100-gram quantities

starting_material: Fusarium sambucinum AB1900A-1314 NRRL 21252
key_reaction: kiloliter-scale fermentation allowed detection of minor Fusacandin B congener
scalability: minor congener in scale-up fermentation
notes: Fusacandin B was produced in minor amounts and detected only on scale-up to kiloliter fermentations; no independent yield is tabulated in paper I.

starting_material: Fusarium sp. AB2202W-161 NRRL 25158

starting_material: Fusarium sp. AB2202W-161 NRRL 25158

starting_material: Trichothecium sp.

starting_material: Fusarium strain F29602 FERM P-12503

notes: F29602 was isolated from soil in Saitama Prefecture and deposited as FERM P-12503; culture at 28 C for 72 h in 100 flasks yielded 16 mg purified white amorphous powder.

starting_material: propane-1,3-diol; hept-1-yne; protected spiroketal glycoside 4; triethyl phosphonocrotonate
key_reaction: enantioselective pinanyl-9-BBN reduction to chiral building block 3; Pd-catalyzed cross-coupling; LAH alkyne reduction; TPAP oxidation; Horner-Emmons tetraenoate formation; Yamaguchi-type C3 esterification; TBAF deprotection
scalability: chiral building block prepared on gram scale; final product isolated after TBAF deprotection in 41% yield
notes: Selected reported yields: TIPS monoether 67%, propargylic alcohol sequence 74%, ketone 71%, enantioselective reduction 75% and 97% ee, terminal alkyne 3 92%, Pd coupling 79%, diene diol 11 82% in text, pivaloylation/silylation/reduction 59% over three steps, TPAP oxidation 68%, Horner-Emmons product 16 74%, acid 17 91%, C3 ester 18 31%, final deprotection 41%. TASF caused elimination to pentaene 19; TBAF plus MeOH-MeCN-CH2Cl2 chromatography was successful.
